name: clangdhelper
description: Generate compile_commands.json for qmake projects and keep clangd in sync.

clangdHelper.projectFile.description: Path to the target .pro file. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace folder.

clangdHelper.buildDirectory.description: Build directory for qmake and make. Supports ${workspaceFolder}, ${projectDir}, ${projectName}, ${projectFileStem}, and ${projectFileDirName}.

clangdHelper.compilationDatabaseDirector.description: Directory where compile_commands.json will be generated. Supports the same placeholders as buildDirectory plus ${buildDirectory}.

clangdHelper.qmakeArgs.description: Additional arguments passed to qmake before the project file path.

clangdHelper.makePath.description: Path to the make-like executable used after qmake.

clangdHelper.makeArgs.description: Additional arguments passed to make or the bundled helper.

clangdHelper.envBootstrap.description: Optional shell snippet executed through bash -lc before qmake and compilation database generation.

clangdHelper.compiledbStrategy.description: How to resolve compiledb. auto uses a system compiledb first, then attempts installation, and finally falls back to the bundled helper.

clangdHelper.compiledbPath.description: Explicit path to a compiledb executable. When set, it overrides the strategy.

clangdHelper.updateClangdArguments.description: Update workspace clangd.arguments with the generated compilation database directory.

clangdHelper.restartClangdAfterSync.description: Restart clangd after a successful syncProject run.

scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run build && pnpm exec vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository -o clangdhelper.vsix
